commit.message:
Add ubgo/lock to Distributed Systems (#6300)

A distributed lock family for Go with one interface and five
backends (filelock, flock, Redis, Postgres, etcd). Backends share
a Locker interface so callers swap between them with one line of
wiring. Every backend ships fencing tokens, semaphore mode, and
observability hooks.

Co-authored-by: khanakia <amank@solverhood.com>

verification.payload:
tree 825a4ccce44c873960cffa52a7053be94e2b0840
parent 1b51e270e780b5c7adf4c7648e5d1fe0efc50b30
author Aman Bansal <khanakia@gmail.com> 1777924781 +0530
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1777924781 +0000

Add ubgo/lock to Distributed Systems (#6300)

A distributed lock family for Go with one interface and five
backends (filelock, flock, Redis, Postgres, etcd). Backends share
a Locker interface so callers swap between them with one line of
wiring. Every backend ships fencing tokens, semaphore mode, and
observability hooks.

Co-authored-by: khanakia <amank@solverhood.com>
